data.title: What's Going On With Greenwave Technology Solutions Stock Today?
data.description: Greenwave Technology Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: GWAV) shares are trading higher Tuesday following the company's announcement that it acquired real estate for seven of its core metal recycling facilities, a move expected to enhance its financial and strategic position.
